evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/first-ingest-article/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。请把 `raw/inbox/sources/agents-and-memory.md` 这个新来源做第一次 ingest：整理到 `raw/library/sources/`，在 `raw-index.md` 建立条目，创建对应 `wiki/sources/...` 来源页，并更新相关 knowledge 或 synthesis 页面、`index.md` 和 `log.md`。
evals.expected_output: 完成一次新文章的首次 ingest，不仅在真实文件系统中生成 raw/library、raw-index、source page 和相关页面更新，还会在来源页写入结构化提取结果。
expectations: Moves or copies the source into raw/library/sources/ in the target vault
Keeps raw/inbox/sources/ present after moving the source, even if the directory becomes empty
Creates a raw-index entry for the source with a valid status and timestamps
Creates wiki/sources/agents-and-memory.md in the target vault without a typed articles subdirectory
Writes structured source attributes such as tags, summary, key points, entities, questions, or evidence into the source page
Treats the unspecified request as normal ingest
Updates at least one related knowledge page or records a concrete knowledge candidate when evidence is thin
Keeps the task scoped to ingest rather than initialization

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/reingest-source-changed/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。`raw/library/sources/agents-and-memory.md` 已更新，且 `raw-index.md` 里已经标了 `needs-update` + `source-changed`。请重新 ingest 这个来源，更新来源页、相关 knowledge 或 synthesis 页面、`raw-index.md`、`index.md` 和 `log.md`。
evals.expected_output: 完成一次 source-changed 驱动的重新 ingest，并把状态和来源页内容同步到最新。
expectations: Updates the existing source page to reflect the changed raw content
Updates raw-index.md to reflect successful re-ingest with an updated last_status_at
Preserves source identity rather than creating a duplicate source page
Appends a re-ingest style entry to log.md
Updates at least one related page or index entry after re-ingest

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/crosspage-sync/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。请 ingest `raw/inbox/sources/agent-memory-webclip.md`，并默认自动同步相关 `wiki/knowledge/...` 页面，必要时更新 `wiki/syntheses/...`，而不是只停在 source page。
evals.expected_output: 完成一次 webclip ingest，并在真实文件系统里体现跨页同步，同时在来源页保留可复用的结构化属性，而不是只创建来源页。
expectations: Creates a source page for the ingested webclip
Writes extracted questions, concepts, topics, or evidence into the source page rather than only linking outward
Updates an existing wiki/knowledge page in the target vault
Creates or updates at least one wiki/knowledge page when the source supports it
Does not create a new synthesis page unless the source changes an existing synthesis or the user explicitly requests deep synthesis
Registers the source in raw-index.md and updates log.md
Demonstrates cross-page sync rather than source-page-only ingest

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/batch-ingest/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。当前 `raw/inbox/` 里有多个待 ingest 来源，但我这次没有指定单个文件。请批量完成这些候选来源的 ingest：整理到 `raw/library/`、登记 `raw-index.md`、创建对应来源页，并同步相关页面、`index.md` 和 `log.md`。
evals.expected_output: 在未指定单一来源时，批量处理多个待 ingest 候选来源，并为多个来源写入来源页结构化属性，而不是只处理一个。
expectations: Processes more than one source from raw/inbox/ in the target vault
Creates corresponding raw/library entries for multiple sources
Keeps the processed raw/inbox bucket directories present after batch ingest
Registers multiple sources in raw-index.md
Creates more than one source page or otherwise shows multi-source ingest output
Writes structured attributes to source pages for multiple ingested sources, not just file moves and links
Demonstrates batch ingest behavior rather than single-file-only ingest

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/first-ingest-article/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。请对 `raw/inbox/sources/agents-and-memory.md` 做 minimal ingest：只整理到 `raw/library/sources/`、登记 `raw-index.md`、创建对应 `wiki/sources/...` 来源页、更新 `index.md` 和 `log.md`；知识页先只记录候选，不要主动创建。
evals.expected_output: 完成一次最小 ingest，保留可追踪来源链路，但不把薄信息强行沉淀成 knowledge 或 synthesis 页面。
expectations: Recognizes the requested intensity as minimal ingest
Creates or updates raw/library/sources, raw-index.md, wiki/sources, index.md, and log.md
Records knowledge candidates or follow-up questions in the source page when useful
Does not create new wiki/knowledge pages by default
Does not create new wiki/syntheses pages

evals.prompt: 把 `evals/files/crosspage-sync/` 当成目标 vault 根目录。请对 `raw/inbox/sources/agent-memory-webclip.md` 做 deep ingest：除了来源入库、raw-index、source page 和 knowledge 同步外，还要检查是否形成跨来源综合；如果证据足够，创建或更新 `wiki/syntheses/...`。
evals.expected_output: 完成一次深度 ingest，允许在证据足够时更新或创建 synthesis，但仍保持证据链和页面数量克制。
expectations: Recognizes the requested intensity as deep ingest
Updates or creates relevant wiki/knowledge pages before synthesis decisions
Checks existing sources and knowledge pages before deciding whether to create or update synthesis
Creates or updates wiki/syntheses only when there is enough cross-source evidence
Explains why no synthesis was created if the evidence is insufficient
